case_title: DE SOTO CAB COOPERATIVE CO. VS HARAS, LOUIS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE SOTO CAB COOPERATIVE CO. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HARAS, LOUIS DEFENDANT'S LAST NAME IS CORRECTED TO; HARAS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
